name: Citrus, Fennel Dressing 1cup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, fry the bacon until crisp. Drain and remove, then set aside.
2. To the hot drippings, add the mustard, salt, pepper, fennel seed, honey, and cider vinegar. Bring to a boil and simmer for 30 seconds.
3. Remove from heat and whisk in the orange juice and olive oil.
4. Use the reserved bacon to top the salad, or toss the salad with the crumbled bacon and serve.
